audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds. Line 2085-2086 checks if self.slot() < block_header.slot and returns DelayUntilSlot, which causes the mutator to return ValidationOutcome::Ignore(false) to P2P (preventing gossip propagation) and queues the sidecar for processing when its slot arrives. This correctly implements the spec's [IGNORE] semantic for future slots.
